interventions.name: P3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: state-tracing routines that record variable values step by step

interventions.name: P3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: if-then branch walkthroughs with explicit true and false pathway comparisons

interventions.name: P3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: before-and-after state tables connecting updates to later outputs

interventions.name: P3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired transfer tasks using the same state-and-branch structure in a second program context
